title: Communications resources to help you move goods from Great Britain to Northern Ireland
body: "This page brings together resources, information and links to help you understand the Windsor Framework.  Guidance  These materials should be used alongside the core guidance on moving goods from Great Britain to Northern Ireland under the Windsor Framework.  Moving post and parcels from Great Britain to Northern Ireland  Read statutory guidance on future arrangements for moving parcels from Great Britain to Northern Ireland under the Windsor Framework.  Fact sheets  You can share this fact sheet with your members or relevant businesses and partners:   Trader Support Service users: Information about moving goods from Great Britain to Northern Ireland business-to-business parcel movements under the Windsor Framework   Videos  You can watch a video that explains the steps that businesses need to take to be able to make business parcel movements from Great Britain to Northern Ireland under the Windsor Framework.  Webinars  You can access webinars from this page:   webinar for hauliers: sending Parcels from Great Britain to Northern Ireland (HMRC, 4 March 2025) webinar for businesses: sending Parcels from Great Britain to Northern Ireland (HMRC, 24 February 2025) webinar for hauliers: Parcel movements under the Windsor Framework (HMRC, 3 December 2024) webinar on the Trader Support Service and Windsor Framework changes (Northern Ireland Customs Academy) webinar for businesses: business-to-business parcel movements under the Windsor Framework (HMRC, 21 November 2021)   Checklists  Use these to help you:   moving business-to-business (B2B) parcels from Great Britain to Northern Ireland making freight movements from Great Britain to Northern Ireland under the Windsor Framework   "
